raw_consumer_statement: American Express agrees with me that i was scammed by a company called XXXX but says that i am responsible to pay the charge of {$4500.00} anyway because the company abided by FTC guidelines. They say that I signed a XXXX agreement which i do not remember signing. I am a woman XXXX XXXX XXXX and am angry and embarrassed that I find myself in this predicament, but I am now in the position of having to pay the original cost of XXXX XXXX airline tickets for {$4500.00} and ALSO pay for the scammer who supposedly rebooked them for another {$4500.00}. I thought I was talking to a XXXX XXXX agent who was helping me apply XXXX to my purchase. He lied to me that he had done that and canceled the previous booking I had made. Instead he left that booking so now I have over {$9000.00} to pay.
